description_long: This is a large, modern SUV with a robust and boxy body style, finished in a matte dark gray color. The vehicle features four side doors and a rear hatch, with tinted windows and minimal chrome detailing, giving it a sleek, understated appearance. The wheels are solid black with a simple, utilitarian design, and the tires are thick, suitable for both urban and off-road environments. The rear of the SUV includes a visible license plate, rear lights with red lenses, and a subtle roof spoiler. The front end is characterized by a wide, blacked-out grille and integrated headlights, contributing to a bold, aggressive look. The overall design suggests a focus on durability, passenger capacity, and versatility for city or suburban use.
description: A large, matte dark gray SUV with four doors, tinted windows, and solid black wheels, designed for urban and suburban environments. It features a boxy, robust body and minimal chrome accents.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tailgate, rear lights, license plate, and roof spoiler.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, tinted windows, and solid black wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide black grille, integrated headlights, and bold hood.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, windows, and wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: solid black wheels with no visible spokes or decorative patterns
